title: Creamy Coconut Shrimp
description: A creamy and tender dish with a touch of coconut flavor that's perfect for brunch or any vegetarian-friendly meal.
instructions: Heat sesame oil in a large pan over medium-high heat.
Add minced garlic and ginger, sauté for about 2 minutes until fragrant.
Add shrimp to the pan and cook for about 4-5 minutes or until pink and opaque.
Remove shrimp from pan and set aside. Reduce the heat to low.
In the same pan, add coconut milk and heavy cream, stir to combine. Bring to a simmer.
Stir in minced garlic and ginger, sugar, salt, and pepper. Cook for about 5 minutes until the sauce thickens slightly.
Add cooked shrimp back into the sauce and toss gently.
Garnish with fresh cilantro if using. Serve hot as a side dish or alongside other brunch favorites.
